messages.content: Play bollywood best songs on yt
I will open YouTube and play a playlist of the best Bollywood songs for you.
The request to play Bollywood's best songs on YouTube has been fulfilled. The video 'JAWAN: Chaleya' is now playing.
I will open the Visual Studio Code application on your computer for you.
I understood this is an OS task but I'm not sure how to handle: 'Open VS Code'. Please be more specific.
I will open the Brave web browser and go to the Spotify website for you.
Spotify has been opened successfully on the browser.
